transcript: Now, let's return to those events in Downing Street that we showed you about an hour or so ago because President Obama, or former President Obama, there at number 10 in the last hour. He's just emerged in the last couple of minutes. Just want to show you those pictures. It wasn't the longest of meetings, perhaps about 30, 40 minutes, but there President Obama just trying to find his car initially but uh as he wanders over let me just put the sound up and hear just a little of what the report is shouting did you discuss gaza how did it go what did you talk about Well, he's finally found the car and avoiding all of those questions. We were talking to Helen Catt a little earlier and a certain amount of surprise amongst the political reporters there, suddenly seeing the former American president arriving there at Downing Street. No word about what exactly was discussed in that meeting. If we hear, we'll obviously return to that.
